title: Dandat 100 Pcs Mini Glass Jars Bottles with Cork Stoppers, 5ml, 10ml, 14ml DIY Decoration Small Clear Glass Jars for Halloween Arts Crafts Projects Wedding Party Favors
description:
Rich Glass Bottle Set: we will provide you with a total of 100 pieces of mini glass bottles with cork in 3 sizes, this sufficient quantity and appropriate size combination can easily meet your daily use and decoration needs
3 Sizes Adoption: our small glass vials are in 3 different sizes, 25 pcs measure about 0.94 x 2.36 inches/ 24 x 60 mm, 0.5 oz/ 14 ml, and 25 pcs measure about 0.87 x 1.97 inches/ 22 x 50 mm, 0.3 oz/ 10 ml, and the rest 50 pcs are about 0.71 x 1.57 inches/ 18 x 40 mm, 0.2 oz/ 5 ml, they can meet your daily or party needs
Reliable Glass Material: our mini potion bottle is made of quality glass with high transparency, and the leakproof cork is lightweight but reliable enough, not easily broken or deformed, and can be safely applied for your hand made or storage
Enjoy DIY Crafts Fun: the apothecary bottles have certain capacities, ideal for you to add a little sand, wishing message, and seashells for a neat beach themed wedding, or you can put some candies or drinks as decorations for your baby shower, just use your imagination and creativity to DIY your creative ornaments
Functional Decorative Bottles: the tiny glass jars can be applied for packaging medicines and perfumes, making drift bottles, wedding decorations, party gifts, message bottles, wishing bottles, and storing dried flowers, tea leaves, seeds, seasonings, spice, herbs, essential oils, and more
reviews_5s: Husband's mom likes them.These jars are the perfect size for making little trinkets or spell jars. I love them! You get your bang for your buck.
reviews_1s: Multiple 10ml and 15ml bottles were broken upon arrival. And no corks for the 5ml bottles. The quantity and sizes were as described but missing key pieces and having broken bottles is a real bummer!
